description_long: This is a stone obelisk monument with a rectangular, tiered base and a polished, dark stone plaque at the top. The base consists of multiple stacked rectangular layers, each slightly smaller than the one below, creating a stepped appearance. The front face features a large, inscribed plaque with text in Japanese, while the topmost section is a dark, glossy stone slab with additional inscriptions. The structure is set on a rectangular stone platform that is flush with the ground and surrounded by a patch of grass. The overall design is formal and commemorative, typical of memorials or monuments found in parks or public spaces. The materials appear to be primarily granite or marble, giving the obelisk a solid and enduring presence.
description: A tiered stone obelisk monument with a dark, inscribed plaque and a stepped rectangular base, set on a stone platform. The front features Japanese inscriptions and a polished finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stepped, rectangular layers of the base and the vertical alignment of the dark plaque at the top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large inscribed plaque with Japanese text and the polished dark stone slab above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the layered stone construction and the thickness of the monument.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain back of the obelisk with no visible inscriptions and the stepped base structure.
attribute_inscription: Japanese inscriptions are present on the front face of the base and on the upper dark stone plaque. The text is engraved and appears to be legible, with a formal style typical of memorials.
attribute_ornamentation: None visible; the design is simple and unadorned except for the inscriptions.
attribute_base_design: The base is composed of several stacked rectangular stone layers, each slightly smaller than the one below, forming a stepped platform. The front layer features a large, inscribed plaque.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a flat, polished, dark stone slab with engraved inscriptions, rectangular in shape and without additional ornamentation.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a rectangular stone platform surrounded by a patch of grass; no other notable features are immediately present.
